description: Composition Blue polo jersey made of 100% polyester, has a ribbed collar with an orange stripe, short sleeves, concealed buttoned chest placket, mesh tri-coloured panels under the armholes, sides and back, rubber applique of the Sahara brand and board of cricket on the front and left chest and brand swoosh on the right chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach,dry clean or use softners Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Bring out the cricketer in you with this jersey from nike. Crafted from soft polyester fabric that wicks sweat away and offers exemplary dry comfort all day. This T-shirt is a perfect combination of comfort and sport and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers and jet set to take on the world in style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
